overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic survival horror game. A character wearing a hooded jacket and headlamp explores a foggy industrial complex at night, climbing a ladder to a rooftop, entering a maintenance unit, discovering a body, and exiting into a combat-ready stance. The atmosphere is dark and misty with teal-green fog and high-quality Unreal Engine-style rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy industrial yard with heavy machinery

agents.ego_description: walking through the muddy industrial yard toward a metal ladder attached to a brick wall

entered.detail: large metal equipment and scaffolding on the right side of the muddy yard
tall metal ladder attached to the brick wall leading upward
tall weathered brick wall with the ladder mounted to it

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dark, foggy industrial yard with muddy ground. Large machinery and scaffolding are visible on the right, while ahead stands a tall brick wall with a metal ladder leading upward into the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical ladder shaft on exterior brick wall

events.description: character begins ascending the metal ladder

agents.ego_description: climbing up the metal ladder attached to the brick wall, using a headlamp to illuminate the rungs

entered.detail: small rectangular window in the brick wall to the right of the ladder
industrial light fixture visible at the top of the ladder shaft

segments.scene_description: The character climbs the metal ladder fixed to the brick wall. The camera follows from behind as they ascend, passing a small window and approaching an overhead light fixture at the top of the shaft.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy industrial rooftop with distant lights

events.description: character reaches top of ladder and emerges onto open rooftop platform
character walks under overhead industrial lights illuminating the fog

agents.ego_description: walking across the foggy rooftop toward a distant maintenance building, navigating around equipment

entered.detail: concrete rooftop surface with scattered debris and equipment
tall pole with bright lights illuminating the foggy area
low industrial building with a doorway ahead in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the foggy rooftop, the character walks across the concrete platform toward a distant maintenance building. Industrial light poles cast beams through the teal-tinted fog, creating an eerie atmosphere as the character approaches the target building.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark maintenance unit interior with metal flooring

events.description: character enters the maintenance unit through a metal doorway
character discovers a dead body on the floor and shines flashlight on it

agents.ego_description: entering the dark maintenance room and crouching to examine a dead body lying on the metal grating floor

notable_agents.action: dead body lying on the metal floor with eyes open, wearing an orange jacket

entered.detail: open metal door frame leading into the dark interior
metal grid flooring with hexagonal pattern
stacked cardboard boxes on wooden pallets
large metal pipes running along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dark maintenance unit through a metal doorway, revealing a room with metal grating floors and stacked boxes. Upon approaching the center of the room, the character discovers a dead body on the floor and crouches to examine it with a flashlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy rooftop exterior with industrial equipment

events.description: character exits the maintenance unit back onto the rooftop
character raises weapon and enters combat stance while scanning the area

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and assuming a combat-ready stance with weapon raised, scanning the foggy surroundings cautiously

entered.detail: large industrial crate or container on the rooftop

segments.scene_description: The character exits the maintenance unit back onto the foggy rooftop, leaving the doorway behind. They immediately raise their weapon and enter a combat stance, cautiously scanning the area while moving past industrial equipment crates as the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a muddy industrial yard up onto a foggy rooftop and into a grim interior before returning to a state of high alert. It begins with the character navigating a dark, foggy yard past heavy machinery, moving toward a brick wall where the camera follows from behind as they ascend a metal ladder. Upon emerging onto the concrete rooftop, the scene expands into a teal-tinted mist illuminated by industrial light poles, leading the character toward a distant maintenance building. The camera then follows them through a metal doorway into a dark room of grating and boxes, where the character crouches to examine a dead body with a flashlight. Finally, the movement shifts back outside onto the rooftop, where the character exits the building and immediately raises their weapon into a combat stance while scanning the surrounding equipment crates.
